ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-18-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Continued To Apr-18-25 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 505

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Lydia Villarreal; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:10 am and concluding at 9:13 am.

Plaintiff Tracy Velasquez Brenes is present via zoom video conference, represented by Marianne Armenta, Esq., placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Precision security solutions not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts.

The Court has reviewed the pleadings and is satisfied.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Tracy Velasquez Brenes, and against Defendant Precision security solutions, as follows:

1. Damages: $57,456.32
2. Prejudgment Interest: $13,521.91
3. Costs: $245.00
4. Attorney fees: $41,867.08

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $113,090.31

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
